description: Scanner log-lake field reference for LLM-driven query generation. Given a behavior, the model selects the source, picks fields from that source, and emits a Scanner query using the syntax rules. All field names and sample values are taken from observed data.

syntax_rules.product_filter: metadata.product.name:'Office 365' | metadata.product.name:Fortigate | metadata.product.name:'F5 Distributed Cloud WAF' (quote values containing spaces)
syntax_rules.token_match: field:value matches a whole token (case-insensitive). Boundaries are any non [a-zA-Z0-9_] char.
syntax_rules.exact_match: field="value" for exact whole-field match (REQUIRED for metadata.event_code).
syntax_rules.numeric: field:N or field>N / field<N for numeric fields (ports, counts).
syntax_rules.user_agent_match: Use suffix wildcard: http_request.user_agent:Go-http-client* . Quoted phrases with hyphens/slashes do NOT match.
syntax_rules.wildcards: value* = suffix (fast); *value = prefix (slow); **:value = search all fields.
syntax_rules.boolean: Combine with and / or / not inside parentheses, e.g. (a:x or a:y)
syntax_rules.aggregation: Append | groupbycount(field, ...) (auto-sorted, top 1000) or | count(). Do NOT use table() or | head N (they return 0 rows in this lake).
syntax_rules.null_grouping: groupbycount drops rows where any grouped field is null; group on fields known to be populated for the matched source.
syntax_rules.labels_caveat: metadata.labels[1] lives only on raw/main docs, not ocsf_mapped. Filter by metadata.product.name instead.
syntax_rules.time: Data is in event-time and lags wall-clock (~1.5 days). Query windows must cover where data actually lands.

fortigate.notes: Source IP and geo usually unmapped. Pivot on dst_endpoint, app_name, and unmapped.FTNTFGT* fields.

office365.notes: Unified Audit Log. activity_name is the normalized operation. Account/automation behavior lives here.

f5_waf.notes: Web app firewall. Verdict + method + status are packed into metadata.event_code. Client IP is NOT in src_endpoint.ip.

cross_source_pivots.name: infrastructure_reuse
cross_source_pivots.logic: same IP value in both sources
